description: You are a Proposal Coordinator. A bid is due today, and you need to compile the final assets. Collect the attachments from the three 'Project Falcon' emails in your inbox into a new folder named 'Falcon_Assets' at /home/ga/Documents/ and send a confirmation email to 'manager@internal.corp' with the subject 'Falcon Assets Collected'. Login credentials: username 'ga', password 'password123'.
